matchingDescription: UK investment platform, stocks and shares ISA, SIPP, shares dealing, funds, largest UK investment platform

variants.text: Hargreaves Lansdown is the UK's largest investment platform. Open a Stocks and Shares ISA and invest in funds, shares, and ETFs — all in one place.
Manage your ISA and pension in one place with Hargreaves Lansdown — the UK's largest investment platform, trusted by over 1.8 million clients.
Build an income portfolio with Hargreaves Lansdown's Stocks and Shares ISA — access thousands of income-paying shares, funds, and investment trusts.
New to investing? Hargreaves Lansdown makes it simple to open a Stocks and Shares ISA and start building your portfolio, with expert guidance available.
Hargreaves Lansdown gives access to thousands of UK and global investments inside a Stocks and Shares ISA — shares, funds, ETFs, and investment trusts.
